examples: They were pink. And satiny. And you know what?
The satiny sandalwood scent came from the splendid sofa.
It has a smooth, satiny texture and is labeled according to its butterfat content.
The mirrors reflect light into the etched glass, producing a greenish, satiny wall surface.
Satiny leopard-print pajamas hung beneath a neon-pink sign for the Cosmopolitan brand, a new partnership.
